requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — South Sudan Fire Authority and NFPA 855 in Donor/EPC Project Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——南苏丹消防机关及捐助方/EPC项目规格中的NFPA 855
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——南蘇丹消防機關及捐助方/EPC項目規格中的NFPA 855

summary.en: South Sudan does not have a publicly confirmed national BESS-specific fire safety installation regulation equivalent to a developed-market fire code. The South Sudan National Fire Brigade operates under the Ministry of Interior and is responsible for fire safety, but a formal published fire code or technical specification for stationary BESS installations accessible from official sources has not been confirmed as of the dataset date. South Sudan has extremely limited fire safety enforcement capacity outside Juba. In practice, BESS fire safety in South Sudan is governed primarily by the project-owner's or donor's technical specifications, which routinely reference NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) as the internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code. Donor organisations including UNDP, World Bank, and the EU typically require NFPA 855-aligned fire safety documentation as part of project technical due diligence and site acceptance. Given South Sudan's extreme ambient temperatures (regularly exceeding 40 °C, seasonally up to 45 °C), BESS thermal-runaway risk is elevated relative to temperate climates and fire safety design must explicitly address high-temperature thermal management, thermal runaway propagation mitigation, and adequate ventilation or active cooling.
summary.zh: 南苏丹尚无公开确认的专门针对BESS的国家级消防安全安装法规，相当于发达市场的消防规范。南苏丹国家消防队隶属于内政部，负责消防安全，但截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认公开发布的适用于固定式BESS安装的正式消防规范或技术规格。朱巴以外地区消防安全执法能力极为有限。实际上，南苏丹BESS消防安全主要由项目业主或捐助方技术规格管控，这些规格通常将NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）作为国际上占主导地位的BESS消防安装规范。UNDP、世界银行和欧盟等捐助方组织通常将符合NFPA 855的消防安全文件作为项目技术尽职调查和现场验收的要求。鉴于南苏丹极端的环境温度（经常超过40°C，季节性峰值可达45°C），与温带气候相比，BESS热失控风险更高，消防安全设计须明确解决高温热管理、热失控蔓延缓解及充足通风或主动冷却问题。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹尚無公開確認的專門針對BESS的國家級消防安全安裝法規，相當於發達市場的消防規範。南蘇丹國家消防隊隸屬於內政部，負責消防安全，但截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認公開發布的適用於固定式BESS安裝的正式消防規範或技術規格。朱巴以外地區消防安全執法能力極為有限。實際上，南蘇丹BESS消防安全主要由項目業主或捐助方技術規格管控，這些規格通常將NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）作為國際上佔主導地位的BESS消防安裝規範。UNDP、世界銀行和歐盟等捐助方組織通常將符合NFPA 855的消防安全文件作為項目技術盡職調查和現場驗收的要求。鑑於南蘇丹極端的環境溫度（經常超過40°C，季節性峰值可達45°C），與溫帶氣候相比，BESS熱失控風險更高，消防安全設計須明確解決高溫熱管理、熱失控蔓延緩解及充足通風或主動冷卻問題。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; referenced by donor and EPC project specifications in South Sudan; national adoption by South Sudan fire authority unconfirmed as of dataset date)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (commonly referenced in donor project specifications for fire suppression)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (commonly referenced in donor project specifications for fire alarm systems)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
South Sudan National Fire Brigade — Ministry of Interior (fire safety authority; formal BESS-specific fire code unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation prepared under GB standards is not recognised by South Sudan project authorities or donor organisations as equivalent to NFPA 855-based fire-safety design. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for any project technical review in South Sudan.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由《中华人民共和国消防法》下地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件，不被南苏丹项目主管机关或捐助方组织认可为等同于NFPA 855的消防安全设计。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在南苏丹任何项目技术审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由《中華人民共和國消防法》下地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件，不被南蘇丹項目主管機關或捐助方組織認可為等同於NFPA 855的消防安全設計。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在南蘇丹任何項目技術審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes fire-related system safety requirements)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed national BESS fire safety installation code has been identified for South Sudan as of the dataset date; donor and EPC project specifications universally reference NFPA 855. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy NFPA 855-based project technical requirements. Additionally, South Sudan's extreme climate creates fire safety design requirements beyond standard temperate-climate NFPA 855 application. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the project owner, donor, or South Sudan fire authority whether NFPA 855 applies and identify any country-specific derogations or additional requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855, explicitly addressing: thermal runaway propagation mitigation under high-ambient-temperature conditions (≥40 °C), gas detection and ventilation design validated for South Sudan's climate, fire suppression system design suitable for the deployment environment, emergency shutdown procedures accessible to local operators, and minimum separation distances; (c) thermal runaway mitigation analysis must address elevated baseline temperatures — a thermal runaway event that might be contained in a 25 °C ambient environment presents greater propagation risk at 40–45 °C ambient; (d) consider active cooling system design given extreme ambient heat; (e) engage the project owner's or donor's fire safety engineer for design review before equipment specification is finalised.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，南苏丹尚无经确认的BESS消防安全安装国家规范；捐助方和EPC项目规格普遍引用NFPA 855。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足NFPA 855项目技术要求。此外，南苏丹极端气候带来了超出标准温带气候NFPA 855适用范围的消防安全设计要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向项目业主、捐助方或南苏丹消防机关确认NFPA 855是否适用，并确认任何国别专项豁免或额外要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855的BESS消防安全设计文件，明确解决：高环境温度条件（≥40°C）下的热失控蔓延缓解、经南苏丹气候验证的气体探测和通风设计、适合部署环境的消防抑制系统设计、当地操作人员可操作的紧急停机程序及最小隔离距离；（c）热失控缓解分析须考虑基准温度升高——在25°C环境温度下可能得到遏制的热失控事件，在40-45°C环境温度下具有更大的蔓延风险；（d）鉴于极端环境高温，应考虑主动冷却系统设计；（e）在设备规格最终确定前，聘请项目业主或捐助方的消防安全工程师进行设计审查。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，南蘇丹尚無經確認的BESS消防安全安裝國家規範；捐助方和EPC項目規格普遍引用NFPA 855。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足NFPA 855項目技術要求。此外，南蘇丹極端氣候帶來了超出標準溫帶氣候NFPA 855適用範圍的消防安全設計要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向項目業主、捐助方或南蘇丹消防機關確認NFPA 855是否適用，並確認任何國別專項豁免或額外要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855的BESS消防安全設計文件，明確解決：高環境溫度條件（≥40°C）下的熱失控蔓延緩解、經南蘇丹氣候驗證的氣體探測和通風設計、適合部署環境的消防抑制系統設計、當地操作人員可操作的緊急停機程序及最小隔離距離；（c）熱失控緩解分析須考慮基準溫度升高——在25°C環境溫度下可能得到遏制的熱失控事件，在40-45°C環境溫度下具有更大的蔓延風險；（d）鑑於極端環境高溫，應考慮主動冷卻系統設計；（e）在設備規格最終確定前，聘請項目業主或捐助方的消防安全工程師進行設計審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for all donor-funded BESS projects — donor and EPC specifications require NFPA 855-aligned fire safety design; South Sudan national fire authority formal adoption of NFPA 855 for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with the South Sudan National Fire Brigade or project authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed national BESS fire safety installation code has been identified for South Sudan as of the dataset date. NFPA 855 is the internationally expected fire-safety baseline in all donor-funded South Sudan BESS project specifications, and Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy this requirement. South Sudan's extreme heat (ambient regularly ≥40 °C, seasonal peaks to 45 °C) elevates thermal runaway risk relative to temperate-climate installations and requires explicit NFPA 855-aligned thermal runaway propagation mitigation analysis. Engage the project owner's or donor's fire safety engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，南苏丹尚无经确认的BESS消防安全安装国家规范。NFPA 855是所有捐助方资助南苏丹BESS项目规格中国际预期的消防安全基准，中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足此要求。南苏丹极端高温（环境温度经常≥40°C，季节性峰值至45°C）相较于温带气候安装情境提升了热失控风险，需要明确符合NFPA 855的热失控蔓延缓解分析。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与项目业主或捐助方的消防安全工程师接触，确认适用消防规范及设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，南蘇丹尚無經確認的BESS消防安全安裝國家規範。NFPA 855是所有捐助方資助南蘇丹BESS項目規格中國際預期的消防安全基準，中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足此要求。南蘇丹極端高溫（環境溫度經常≥40°C，季節性峰值至45°C）相較於溫帶氣候安裝情境提升了熱失控風險，需要明確符合NFPA 855的熱失控蔓延緩解分析。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與項目業主或捐助方的消防安全工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範及設計要求。
